title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as luffy enters the waiting room, meets dangerous competitors, and the tournament begins to reveal how many powers are converging on Dressrosa.
summary: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
